cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the author did when he met Mr. Lee. The options are A to D. First, I need to find the relevant part of the passage. The author mentions when he was ten, walking with his mother and passing Mr. Lee. He says, "I knew I could see Mr. Lee any time around the neighborhood, so I didn't pay any attention to him." Then his mother scolds him for not speaking to Mr. Lee. So, the key here is that the author didn't say hello to Mr. Lee when he passed him. The mother's lesson was about not ignoring people. Looking at the options, option D is "He ignored him." That seems correct because the author didn't pay attention to Mr. Lee.
